entries.title: Doll garden flash social-video 4-panel set
entries.subject: female
entries.selectionReason: The selected clean 4-panel preview preserves the reusable grammar: pastel flower sunroom, lace/glass layering, powder-blue chiffon styling, transparent umbrella, and plush counter variation. It removes app interface elements such as search bars, play buttons, like/comment/share icons, captions, dates, hashtags, usernames, logos, and watermarks.
failureReasons: v1 included unwanted UI overlay elements and has been superseded by the clean v2 selection.
Panel-level hand details should be checked again if these are split into separate 9:16 final assets.
